name: team_pass_yards_from_plays on player view with multi-year scope via nfl_week_id (no params.year)
description: Regression: when the multi-year selection comes from column nfl_week_id (not params.year) and no year/week split is active, query_context.year_range is empty and the player_year_to_team_year bridge previously fell through to [current_season.year], stranding all 2023-2024 attribution and returning NULL for every player. The fix resolves the effective year range via compute_effective_scope and passes it through params.year to apply_bridge. This fixture pins that player_year_teams is built for years derived from the nfl_week_id scope (not current_season.year).
expected_query: with "t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023, 2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_year_teams"."pid", sum(t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67" inner join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."team" = "t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67"."nfl_team" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67"."year" group by "player_year_teams"."pid"), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023,2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67_team_stats" on "t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67_team_stats"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t7c4d6dccc66ff70cbf98010d8157ec67_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
